title: Neon Tropical Flowers (Macro)
summary: Hyper-saturated macro shot of exotic flowers under UV light - electric pinks and greens.
prompt: An electrifying macro photograph of exotic tropical flowers - bird-of-paradise, neon pink anthurium, glowing chartreuse moss - illuminated by ultraviolet blacklight. Hyper-saturated electric pinks, acid greens, and deep cobalt shadows. Water droplets on the petals catching the UV glow. Pitch-black background. Extreme close-up, razor-sharp 100mm macro lens, National Geographic meets neon-rave aesthetic. Square 1:1 composition.
